section_name: Fees for drivers’ licenses, identification cards, and related services

subsections.text: All net revenue received by the department from the fees specified in subsection (2) of this section, as such fees may be raised or lowered by the department in accordance with subsection (3) of this section, shall be credited to the Colorado DRIVES vehicle services account created in section 42-1-211 (2).
Except as provided in subsection (3) of this section, the following fees must be paid for the following functions:

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The fee for a driving record under section 42-1-206 (2) is nine dollars;

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The fee for a certified driving record under section 42-1-206 (2) is ten dollars;

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: The application fee for an instruction permit under section 42-2-107 is fourteen dollars;

subsections.label: d
subsections.text: The fee for a driver’s license or minor driver’s license under section 42-2-114 (2)(a) or (4)(a), respectively, is:

subsections.label: I
subsections.text: Twenty-six dollars beginning July 1, 2016, but before July 1, 2017;

subsections.label: II
subsections.text: Twenty-seven dollars beginning July 1, 2017, but before July 1, 2018; and

subsections.label: III
subsections.text: Twenty-eight dollars beginning July 1, 2018;

subsections.label: e
subsections.text: The fee for retaking either the examination of knowledge or the demonstration of ability under section 42-2-114 (2)(e) is set by the department not to exceed fifteen dollars;

subsections.label: f
subsections.text: The fee for a duplicate permit or minor driver’s license under section 42-2-117 (1) is twelve dollars for the first duplicate and fourteen dollars for a subsequent duplicate;

subsections.label: g
subsections.text: The fee for a driver’s license extension under section 42-2-118 (1)(b)(I) is six dollars and fifty cents;

subsections.label: h
subsections.text: The fee for the return of a license under section 42-2-127.7 (4)(d)(II) is five dollars;

subsections.label: i
subsections.text: The fee for a replacement license under section 42-2-133 (2) is five dollars;

subsections.label: j
subsections.text: The fee for issuing or renewing an identification card under section 42-2-306 (1)(a) is ten dollars and fifty cents;

subsections.label: k
subsections.text: The fee for reissuance of an identification card that has been canceled or denied under section 42-2-306 (1)(b) is twenty dollars;

subsections.label: l
subsections.text: The fee for issuing a commercial driver’s license under section 42-2-406 (1) and (2) is thirty-five dollars;

subsections.label: m
subsections.text: The fee for administering driving tests under section 42-2-406 (3) is one hundred dollars;

subsections.label: n
subsections.text: The fee for licensing testing units under section 42-2-406 (4) is three thousand ninety-four dollars for the initial license and one thousand fifty-two dollars for each subsequent annual license renewal;

subsections.label: o
subsections.text: The fee for licensing driving testers under section 42-2-406 (5) is one hundred forty-eight dollars for the initial license and one hundred forty dollars for each subsequent annual license renewal; and

subsections.label: p
subsections.text: The fee for issuing an identification document under part 5 of this article.
The department may raise or lower the fees listed in subsection (2) of this section, but the department shall not increase the fee by more than five percent per year.
A rule promulgated under this section that increases fees shall not take effect until thirty days after the department has issued a report to the joint budget committee. The report must:

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: List the fees being changed and the amounts of the changes; and

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Provide an explanation of the reasons for the changes and an analysis of why the changes are needed.
Repealed.
Intentionally left blank —Ed.

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Any reference in the state fiscal year 2022-23 long appropriations bill to the licensing services cash fund shall be deemed to be a reference to the Colorado DRIVES vehicle services account created in section 42-1-211 (2), and any appropriation made in the state fiscal year 2022-23 long bill from or to the licensing services cash fund shall be deemed to be an appropriation from or to the Colorado DRIVES vehicle services account.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: This subsection (6) is repealed, effective July 1, 2024.

On July 1, 2022, the state treasurer shall transfer three million nine hundred thousand dollars from the general fund to the Colorado DRIVES vehicle services account in the highway users tax fund created in section 42-1-211 (2).
